document.heading: Amendments to Title 2, Chapter 4, Article A, Section 2-401.9(B) of the Chickasaw Nation Code (Officers and Employees of the Nation)

para.heading: Death:
para.text: Should an elected or retired official die, and at the time of his death he is carrying dependents on his health and dental insurance, the Nation shall pay to carry the spouse until their death or remarriage. Any other dependents on the plan will be covered in accordance with the insurance plan guidelines.
